coverage.summary: Navigation and anatomy labels are captured. Click-through detail copy for the red numbered anatomy markers is not captured yet because the current incognito page renders as private and direct API/markdown export requests did not return page blocks.
confirmed: Accordion page metadata and tabs from sanitized Zeroheight styleguide navigation data.
Overview anatomy marker labels 1-4 from the user-provided screenshot.
Storybook entry bundle references Accordion and AccordionItem chunks.
not_confirmed: Detailed popover/body text shown after clicking each red anatomy marker.
Exact official design guidance text for each anatomy part.
Full Storybook props and examples for Accordion because lazy-loaded chunks were not downloaded in the current local capture.

POST attempts returned HTTP 400 with empty JSON body.

html_generation: Use this registry only as a partial Accordion source until click-through details are captured.
Prefer official Elements component implementation when the package is available.
When generating static HTML prototypes, load research/tokens/elements-token-vars.css and avoid raw color or spacing values unless they map back to the token allowlist.
Expose the four anatomy parts as named slots or selectors so future detail copy can be attached without changing generated HTML structure.
validation: Fail or warn when generated Accordion content claims official anatomy detail copy that is not present in this registry.
Warn when an Accordion prototype omits label, toggle control, content area, or divider.
Warn when raw CSS values are used instead of Elements token variables.
